content.content:
1→[workspace]
     2→members = [
     3→    "formula",
     4→    "factor", 
     5→    "dmatrix",
     6→    "link",
     7→    "family",
     8→    "optimcore",
     9→    "inference",
    10→    "stats_models",
    11→    "anova",
    12→    "posthoc",
    13→    "benchmarks",
    14→    "resample",
    15→    "mixed_models"
    16→]
    17→resolver = "2"
    18→
    19→[workspace.package]
    20→version = "0.1.0"
    21→edition = "2021"
    22→authors = ["stats-rs contributors"]
    23→license = "MIT OR Apache-2.0"
    24→repository = "https://github.com/stats-rs/stats-rs"
    25→homepage = "https://github.com/stats-rs/stats-rs"
    26→keywords = ["statistics", "modeling", "data-science", "glm", "regression"]
    27→categories = ["mathematics", "science"]
    28→
    29→[workspace.dependencies]
    30→# Linear algebra and numerics
    31→ndarray = { version = "0.15", features = ["rayon", "approx"] }
    32→nalgebra = "0.32"
    33→faer = "0.22"
    34→approx = "0.5"
    35→
    36→# Data structures
    37→sprs = "0.11"
    38→smartstring = "1.0"
    39→
    40→# Parsing and macros  
    41→pest = "2.7"
    42→pest_derive = "2.7"
    43→proc-macro2 = "1.0"
    44→quote = "1.0"
    45→syn = { version = "2.0", features = ["full"] }
    46→
    47→# Parallel computation
    48→rayon = "1.8"
    49→
    50→# Serialization
    51→serde = { version = "1.0", features = ["derive"] }
    52→
    53→# Testing and benchmarking
    54→criterion = "0.5"
    55→proptest = "1.4"
    56→
    57→# Error handling
    58→thiserror = "1.0"
    59→anyhow = "1.0"
    60→
    61→# Statistical distributions
    62→statrs = "0.17"
    63→
    64→# Internal crates (for benchmarks)
    65→stats_models = { path = "stats_models" }
    66→dmatrix = { path = "dmatrix" }
    67→
    68→# Documentation
    69→mdbook = "0.4"
    70→
    71→# Random number generation for benchmarks
    72→rand = "0.8"
    73→rand_distr = "0.4"
    74→
    75→[profile.release]
    76→lto = true
    77→codegen-units = 1
    78→panic = "abort"
    79→
    80→[profile.bench]
    81→debug = true

file.content:
[workspace]
members = [
    "formula",
    "factor", 
    "dmatrix",
    "link",
    "family",
    "optimcore",
    "inference",
    "stats_models",
    "anova",
    "posthoc",
    "benchmarks",
    "resample",
    "mixed_models"
]
resolver = "2"

[workspace.package]
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2021"
authors = ["stats-rs contributors"]
license = "MIT OR Apache-2.0"
repository = "https://github.com/stats-rs/stats-rs"
homepage = "https://github.com/stats-rs/stats-rs"
keywords = ["statistics", "modeling", "data-science", "glm", "regression"]
categories = ["mathematics", "science"]

[workspace.dependencies]
# Linear algebra and numerics
ndarray = { version = "0.15", features = ["rayon", "approx"] }
nalgebra = "0.32"
faer = "0.22"
approx = "0.5"

# Data structures
sprs = "0.11"
smartstring = "1.0"

# Parsing and macros  
pest = "2.7"
pest_derive = "2.7"
proc-macro2 = "1.0"
quote = "1.0"
syn = { version = "2.0", features = ["full"] }

# Parallel computation
rayon = "1.8"

# Serialization
serde = { version = "1.0", features = ["derive"] }

# Testing and benchmarking
criterion = "0.5"
proptest = "1.4"

# Error handling
thiserror = "1.0"
anyhow = "1.0"

# Statistical distributions
statrs = "0.17"

# Internal crates (for benchmarks)
stats_models = { path = "stats_models" }
dmatrix = { path = "dmatrix" }

# Documentation
mdbook = "0.4"

# Random number generation for benchmarks
rand = "0.8"
rand_distr = "0.4"

[profile.release]
lto = true
codegen-units = 1
panic = "abort"

[profile.bench]
debug = true

      --no-fail-fast             Run all tests regardless of failure
      --future-incompat-report   Outputs a future incompatibility report at the end of the build

  -v, --verbose...               Use verbose output (-vv very verbose/build.rs output)
      --color <WHEN>             Coloring: auto, always, never
      --config <KEY=VALUE|PATH>  Override a configuration value
